en.text: to leave,  permit,  forsake,  cast off or away,  reject,  suffer,  join, spread out or abroad,  be loosed,  cease,  abandon,  quit,  hang loose, cast down,  make a raid,  lie fallow,  let fall,  forgo,  draw
